text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Narita Brian out in a field pulling
weeds with the groundskeeper.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is such a pain! How much more do we have to
do?!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
Punishment. She walked through the field and
trampled the seedlings, so I'm having her pull
weeds.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I said I didn't mean to, didn't I?! Damn! It's really
not my day!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine! I'll make this into a field of despair! Get
ready, weeds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian pulls weeds savagely, but stooping
over all day pulling weeds must be tiring, even for
her...
